resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A broad East Asian reference-panel similarity summary is available for archaeology-themed context, but no ancient-sample matching model or calibrated percentage model is supplied.
resultRows.description: The local fixture supplies broad autosomal context and research-background references only; it does not supply ancient-sample matches, site labels, culture labels, or direct-descent evidence.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is broad reference-panel context only. It is not an ancient-sample match, direct-descent claim, archaeological-site label, culture label, migration-event assignment, identity statement, or health finding.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The Allen Ancient DNA Resource can be used as background context for how ancient-DNA datasets exist, but this fixture supplies no personal ancient-sample comparison output.
resultRows.description: Ancient-DNA datasets do not by themselves prove direct descent, cultural membership, site identity, migration-event participation, or personal relationship to ancient remains.
resultRows.sourceLabel: Allen Ancient DNA Resource / fixture missing-input policy
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report can explain the boundary in plain English, but it should not tell the user they match a specific ancient person, site, culture, civilization, or migration event.

resultRows.brandName: Map My Genes Archaeology sibling World Ancestry sample
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sibling World Ancestry sample demonstrates an overall ethnicity hierarchy, map legend, chromosome-painting page, ethnicity cards, and G-Nomix methodology page as output format only.
resultRows.description: The sample PDF is not an archaeology sample and does not provide ancient-sample matching, direct descent, archaeological-site, culture, civilization, migration-event, identity, or local ancestry findings.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Use the sibling sample to shape map-style sections and citations, not to make any archaeology-specific or user-specific ancient-DNA conclusion.

whatThisDoesNotMean: It does not mean the user matches an ancient sample or person.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample methodology describes assigning ancestry labels to DNA segments from whole-genome or SNP-array data with machine-learning classification and error correction.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Use as observed sample methodology only; the local fixture does not include a calibrated G-Nomix model, reference panel, or segment calls.
